title: Cobblemon Creations
description: A medium-sized kitchen sink modpack focusing on Cobblemon, Create, Farmer's Delight and it's addons, all packaged on the sleek and shiny Neoforge engine!
body:
Welcome! Herein you will find a kitchen-sink styled modpack featuring Cobblemon and Create plus their respective addons! This modpack is specifically for those who want a Minecraft Vanilla+ style experience all while being able to experience the joy of catching Pokemon and crafting interesting Create machines all in a rich and varied world utilizing world gen mods like Terralith, Oh the Biomes We've Gone, and Distant Horizons.

Performance optimizing mods like Sodium and Lithium are included as well to give a smoother gameplay experience.

This modpack is in active development and as such will probably grow in scope as custom scripting mods like KubeJS are updated to work alongside Cobblemon to allow more integration between it and Create. As such, mod variety is liable to change, make sure you read the changelogs before updating!

Intended use-cases for this pack are currently only supported in single-player or very small server environmnenst.
